title: Sign in and load the current driver profile
description: This verifies that an authenticated driver can sign in and see their current profile loaded successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the current driver profile is displayed
Verify the user is signed in

title: Accept a live trip request and progress through the trip lifecycle
description: This verifies that a driver can receive a trip request in real time, accept it, and update the trip through completion.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Wait for a trip request to appear
Mark the trip as in progress
Verify the completed trip state is displayed
Verify the passenger rating is recorded

title: Sign out and lose access to the current profile
description: This verifies that a signed-in driver can sign out and no longer access authenticated profile data in the app.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the signed-out state is displayed
Verify the current driver profile is no longer displayed

title: View live wallet balance
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can open the wallet and see the current balance updating in the UI.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the current wallet balance is displayed
Verify the balance area is visible as part of the wallet view

title: Monitor unread notifications after support activity
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can view notifications and see unread items reflected in the notifications area.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the notifications list is visible

title: See live notifications and unread count after sign-in
description: This verifies an authenticated driver can view the realtime notifications stream and see the current unread notification count.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an unread notification count is displayed

title: Reject invalid sign-in credentials
description: This verifies that invalid login credentials are rejected and no authenticated session is created.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with invalid-credentials
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the user remains signed out

title: Complete onboarding and submit profile for review
description: This test verifies that a first-time driver can finish onboarding by adding profile, vehicle, and document information and then submit the profile for admin review.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Set an avatar for the profile
Verify the profile is marked as under review

title: See unread notifications update after activity
description: This verifies that a driver can open notifications and see the unread count and notification list update after new activity arrives.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Wait for a new notification to appear
Verify the unread notification count updates
Verify the notification is marked as read

title: View wallet balance and earnings breakdown
description: This verifies a driver can open the wallet and inspect the current balance, transaction activity, and earnings breakdown.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the current wallet balance is displayed
Verify earnings breakdown data is displayed

title: Complete driver onboarding and submit for review
description: This verifies that a new driver can finish profile setup with vehicle and document details and submit the profile for review.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the full name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the vehicle make field with a valid make
Fill in the vehicle model field with a valid model
Fill in the vehicle color field with a valid color
Fill in the vehicle plate number field with a valid plate number
Fill in a valid document expiry date
Verify the profile review status is displayed
Verify the onboarding completion state is displayed

title: Submit a withdrawal request
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can create a withdrawal request with valid payout details and see it added in the wallet flow.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the withdrawal amount with a valid value
Fill in the bank name with a valid value
Fill in the account number with a valid value
Fill in the account name with a valid value
Verify a withdrawal request confirmation is visible
Verify the withdrawal request appears in the wallet history

title: Mark a notification as read
description: This verifies a driver can open an unread notification and mark it as read so it no longer appears unread.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the notification is no longer unread

title: Reject a live trip request
description: This verifies that a driver can cancel an incoming trip request instead of accepting it.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Wait for a trip request to appear
Verify the trip request is no longer active
Verify the cancelled trip state is displayed

title: Create a support ticket with an initial message
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can create a new support ticket and send the first message successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a subject for the ticket
Fill in the first message for the ticket
Verify the new support ticket is created
Verify the first message is visible in the ticket conversation

title: Create a withdrawal request
description: This verifies a driver can enter withdrawal details and submit a withdrawal request from the wallet screen.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a valid withdrawal amount
Verify a withdrawal request confirmation is visible

title: Review wallet transactions and withdrawal history
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can browse paginated wallet transactions and see recent withdrawal requests.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify recent withdrawal requests are displayed

title: Continue onboarding from an existing draft profile
description: This verifies a driver can return to onboarding, see previously entered details, and finish submission without losing progress.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify previously saved onboarding details are displayed
Submit the onboarding profile for review
Verify the profile is submitted for under review status

title: Prevent submission before required onboarding details are complete
description: This verifies that a driver cannot submit for review until the required profile, vehicle, and document information is present.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to submit the profile for review
Verify a completeness validation error is visible

title: Browse trip history and open a trip detail
description: This verifies a driver can review past trips, open one trip, and see its detailed information.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a trip from the history list
Verify the trip detail view is displayed

title: Request a wallet withdrawal
description: This verifies that a driver can create a withdrawal request from the wallet screen.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a valid withdrawal amount
Verify the withdrawal request confirmation is visible
Verify the new withdrawal appears in the wallet activity

title: Open trip history and inspect a trip detail
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can browse trip history and open a specific past trip to review its details.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open one trip from the history list
Verify the selected trip remains identifiable in the detail view

title: Mark all notifications as read
description: This verifies a driver can clear the unread state for all notifications from the notifications view.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Create a support ticket and continue the conversation
description: This verifies a driver can create a support ticket with an initial message and continue the threaded conversation from support.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the first support message
Add a follow-up message to the ticket thread
Verify the support conversation is displayed

title: See earnings breakdown for today, week, and month
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can view earnings totals broken down by time period in the wallet area.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify weekly and monthly earnings are displayed

title: See notifications update in realtime
description: This verifies the notifications list updates in the UI when a new notification arrives while the driver is signed in.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Wait for a new notification to appear
Verify the notifications list updates with a new item

title: Continue a support conversation
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can open an existing support ticket and send a follow-up message in the conversation.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new message appears in the conversation
Verify the ticket thread remains open

title: Open a trip from history and review performance metrics
description: This verifies that a driver can review past trips and inspect their performance stats from the trip history area.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a trip from the history list
Verify the trip details are displayed
Verify driver performance metrics are displayed

title: View driver performance metrics
description: This test verifies that an authenticated driver can open the performance area and see their rating and completion metrics.

steps.description: Fill in the driver credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify acceptance rate and completion rate are displayed

title: Review wallet transaction history
description: This verifies a driver can browse wallet transactions and see transaction history entries in the wallet view.

steps.description: Fill in the login email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Scroll to the transaction history section

title: Update the driver avatar and see the new profile image
description: This verifies that a driver can replace their avatar and the updated image is reflected in the profile.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated profile image is displayed
Verify the avatar replacement confirmation is visible

title: Prevent out-of-order trip completion
description: This verifies that trip status changes cannot be completed before the trip has started.

steps.description: Fill in the login credential field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Wait for a trip request to appear
Attempt to mark the trip as completed before starting it
Verify a trip state validation error is visible
Verify the trip remains not completed
